Why Choose Us

THE CEMORET DIFFERENCE

01

Expert Instructors

Certified, patient instructors with deep knowledge of Cameroon's roads — teaching you to drive for life, not just to pass.

02

Flexible Schedules

Morning, afternoon and weekend slots available. We work around your life — school, work, family, no problem.

03

All Licence Categories

Manuel, automatic, commercial — every category covered under one trusted roof.

04

3 Locations in Bamenda

CCC Junction, Annex Vicky Junction & ENS Bambili. Wherever you are in Bamenda, we're nearby.

05

500+ Graduates

A track record that speaks for itself. Trusted by hundreds of families across the Northwest Region.

06

Theory + Practical

Comprehensive classroom theory and hands-on road training. Both skills, one school.

What We Offer

ALL OUR PROGRAMMES

Beginner

Beginner Lessons

Start from zero — manuel & automatic. Structured to build confidence from your very first session.

All Vehicle Types · Flexible
Popular

Refresher Course

Licenced but rusty? We'll get your confidence back fast, safely and on your schedule.

2–5 Sessions · Personalised
Safety

Defensive Driving

Advanced hazard awareness and emergency response techniques for life on any road.

Advanced · Certified
Theory

Theory & Road Signs

Full theory classes: traffic rules, highway code & Cameroon road regulations.

Classroom + Exam Prep
Skills

Parking & Manoeuvring

Parallel parking, reverse bay, hill starts and three-point turns — every scenario covered.

Practical · Exam Ready
Pro

Highway Driving

Real highway experience — overtaking, speed management, lane discipline and long-distance confidence.

Advanced · Long Distance
Road Test

Road Test Prep

Mock exams, examiner tips and test-route practice so you walk in confident and walk out licenced.

Mock Tests · Tips
Corporate

Fleet Driver Training

Custom programmes for companies. Professional, certified, safe drivers for your entire fleet.

For Companies · Groups

How It Works

ROAD TO LICENCE

01

Register

Call, WhatsApp or walk in to any of our 3 Bamenda locations to sign up.

02

Theory Class

Master the highway code, road signs, and Cameroon traffic regulations.

03

Practical Training

Real roads, certified instructor — building skill and confidence session by session.

04

Get Licenced

Pass your exam with full confidence and drive away with your official licence.
